name: sop
description: Standard operating procedure skills for repeatable engineering workflows, including GitLab merge request and GitHub pull request submission.

interface.longDescription: SOP collects standard operating procedure skills for repeatable engineering tasks. The first workflow opens a review request from the current branch by resolving branches, auto-detecting the forge from the git remote, checking prerequisites, summarizing changes, pushing the branch, and creating a GitLab merge request with glab or a GitHub pull request with gh.
defaultPrompt: Use submit-mr to open a merge request or pull request
Create an MR or PR for the current branch
